Class DebugMetadata.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessageLite.Builder
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessage.Builder<DebugMetadata.Builder>
com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.Builder<DebugMetadata.Builder>
org.tensorflow.proto.DebugMetadata.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Message.Builder, MessageLite.Builder, MessageLiteOrBuilder, MessageOrBuilder, Cloneable, DebugMetadataOrBuilder
Enclosing class:
DebugMetadata
public static final class DebugMetadata.Builder extends GeneratedMessage.Builder<DebugMetadata.Builder> implements DebugMetadataOrBuilder
Metadata about the debugger and the debugged TensorFlow program.
Protobuf type tensorflow.DebugMetadata

    • getFileVersion

      public String getFileVersion()
      Version of the DebugEvent file format.
Has a format of "debug.Event:<number>", e.g., "debug.Event:1".
      string file_version = 2;
      Specified by:
      getFileVersion in interface DebugMetadataOrBuilder
      Returns:
      The fileVersion.

    • getTfdbgRunId

      public String getTfdbgRunId()
      A unique ID for the current run of tfdbg.
A run of tfdbg is defined as a TensorFlow job instrumented by tfdbg.
Multiple hosts in a distributed TensorFlow job instrumented by tfdbg
have the same ID.
      string tfdbg_run_id = 3;
      Specified by:
      getTfdbgRunId in interface DebugMetadataOrBuilder
      Returns:
      The tfdbgRunId.

    • getTfdbgRunIdBytes

      public ByteString getTfdbgRunIdBytes()

Multiple hosts in a distributed TensorFlow job instrumented by tfdbg
have the same ID.
      string tfdbg_run_id = 3;
      Specified by:
      getTfdbgRunIdBytes in interface DebugMetadataOrBuilder
      Returns:
      The bytes for tfdbgRunId.
